author: DuckDNS Team
description: duckdns is a DDNS (Dynamic DNS) application that dynamically binds IP addresses to domain names, supporting both IPv4 and IPv6.
tagline: Dynamic DNS for your domain, supporting both IPv4 and IPv6

tips.before_install:
Attention Please
Will update IPv6 address by default. You can modify it by settings.

Please register sub-domain on https://www.duckdns.org/ and gain your token.

title: duckdns
